name: Coconut Cream Cake with Lemon & Lime Filling
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour three 9 x 1 1/2-inch round pans.
Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
Continue beating until the mixture is fluffy, about 2 minutes. Alternately add flour mixtures (in fourths) and milk (in thirds), beginning and ending with flour. Add vanilla; beat just until smooth, about 1 minute.
Pour batter into prepared pans. Bake 25-30 minutes, or until the surface springs back when gently pressed with a fingertip. Cool in pans on wire racks for 10 minutes. Remove from pans; cool on racks.
Filling: In a small saucepan, mix sugar, cornstarch, and salt. Gradually stir in juices, water. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring. Remove from heat. Add yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition. Return to a boil; boil 1 minute. Remove pan from heat. Stir in peels and a few drops of green food coloring (if using). Cool mixture over ice water.
Make Frosting: In a medium bowl, beat cream until stiff. Fold into frosting mixture.
Assemble cake: Place one cake layer, top side down, on a serving platter. Spread with half the filling, almost to the outer edge. Repeat with second layer and remaining filling. Place top layer, right side up. Frost remaining whipped cream over top; garnish with coconut and lime slices. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
